root_text.an5.150:1.1: “Pañcime, bhikkhave, dhammā samayavimuttassa bhikkhuno parihānāya saṁvattanti.
root_text.an5.150:1.3: Kammārāmatā, bhassārāmatā, niddārāmatā, indriyesu aguttadvāratā, bhojane amattaññutā.
root_text.an5.150:1.4: Ime kho, bhikkhave, pañca dhammā samayavimuttassa bhikkhuno parihānāya saṁvattanti.
root_text.an5.150:2.1: Pañcime, bhikkhave, dhammā samayavimuttassa bhikkhuno aparihānāya saṁvattanti.
root_text.an5.150:2.3: Na kammārāmatā, na bhassārāmatā, na niddārāmatā, indriyesu guttadvāratā, bhojane mattaññutā.
root_text.an5.150:2.4: Ime kho, bhikkhave, pañca dhammā samayavimuttassa bhikkhuno aparihānāya saṁvattantī”ti.

translation_text.an5.150:1.1: “Mendicants, these five things lead to the decline of a mendicant who is temporarily free.
translation_text.an5.150:1.3: They relish work, talk, and sleep. They don’t guard the sense doors and they eat too much.
translation_text.an5.150:1.4: These five things lead to the decline of a mendicant who is temporarily free.
translation_text.an5.150:2.1: These five things don’t lead to the decline of a mendicant who is temporarily free.
translation_text.an5.150:2.3: They don’t relish work, talk, and sleep. They guard the sense doors and they have moderation in eating.
translation_text.an5.150:2.4: These five things don’t lead to the decline of a mendicant who is temporarily free.”
